name: Android App
requiredVerification: connected/emulator tests for critical flows where present
manifest permission review when permissions change
releaseChecks: signing, keystore, manifest permissions, and Play Console settings are technically reviewed by Codex when touched
emulator or device launch evidence captured for UI and runtime changes
exact user consent is required only for a prepared Play Console publication, billing or value-transfer effect, provider-account action, real-user communication, or irreversible production-data effect

may: edit Android UI, app logic, tests, build-safe configuration, signing configuration references, and documentation inside the current governed task scope
diagnose and repair Gradle, lint, emulator, permission, signing configuration, and test failures from project evidence
mustNot: delegate signing, keystore, manifest permission, dependency, migration, or test strategy choices to the user
use external account credentials, publish to Play Console, create a paid or value-transfer effect, communicate with real users, or perform an irreversible production-data effect without exact consent
